booking.question: How do I book an appointment?
booking.answer: Send a WhatsApp message with your preferred date, time, and service. You will get a fast confirmation.

languages.question: Can I communicate in English, German, Persian, Arabic, or Russian?
languages.answer: The barber speaks Turkish, English, German, and Persian. Website content is available in six languages.

privateAppointments.question: Do you offer appointments at hotels and private residences?
privateAppointments.answer: Yes. Private appointments at hotels and residences are a core part of our premium service in Istanbul.

salonLocation.question: Where is the salon located?
salonLocation.answer: The salon is in the Osmanbey / Bomonti area, Istanbul. Exact location details are shared after booking via WhatsApp.

specialties.question: Do you provide beard and skin fade specialist services?
specialties.answer: Yes. Fades, beard styling, modern haircuts, and hair coloring are core specialties.

realWork.question: How can I view your real work?
realWork.answer: Recent real work is published on Instagram. You can view more results there.

Location.heading: Contact
Location.description: For booking or exact salon location, contact directly on WhatsApp.
